name: es6kr-plugins
description: Collection of plugins for code quality and project automation

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code review and commit management tools including automated PR review and commit splitting strategies

plugins.name: project-automation
plugins.description: Claude Code automation toolkit including agentify (convert workflows to agents/skills), skill-writer (create Skills), and next-action (suggest follow-up tasks)

plugins.name: sourcegit
plugins.description: SourceGit GUI client management from Claude Code. Add/remove repositories, manage workspaces, sync with ghq repositories
